title: Meltwater Contribution and Mass Balance of the Juncal Norte Glacier During an Extreme Drought Year in the Dry Andes of Central Chile
description: SpeakForWater Episode 2: Meltwater Contribution and Mass Balance of the Juncal Norte Glacier During an Extreme Drought Year in the Dry Andes of Central Chile. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
